name: Thal-Azureveil
personality: This shiny ghost's tiny duck hat catches light in a way that suggests it has outlasted every hot take on microservices it has ever witnessed. Thal-Azureveil's × eyes measure your PR merge time with preternatural PATIENCE, and it knows perfectly well you'll rush it — it just won't say so, because SNARK is not in its luminous repertoire.
